title: The Visual Wonder of Pamukkale

scenes.text: This is a surreal cascading mineral terrace with thermal pools.
This is Pamukkale, located in Denizli, Turkey.
Formed by carbonate minerals, these terraces are known for their healing properties.
The water's turquoise hue offers mesmerizing reflections.
scenes.label: TURQUOISE REFLECTIONS

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.

description: 📍 Pamukkale, Denizli - Turkey. Stunning white travertine terraces filled with thermal pools rich in minerals. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
